criteria.comment: Detected skills are real behavioral patterns (deploy flow, PR review request). Some edge cases where frequency inference is weak.
Expected skills from corpus_meta are mostly detected. Bug triage skill may be missed if evidence is sparse.
Steps use tool:action format where possible. Some steps are too vague (e.g., 'review code' instead of 'github:approve_pr').
Strength scores reflect observed counts. Cross-integration synthesis correctly combines evidence.
No skills detected without chat/memory evidence. Below-threshold candidates properly excluded.

overall_comment: Two-pass skill detection produces reasonable behavioral patterns. Step quality and recall have room to improve. Baseline passes (3.55 / 5.0 > 3.0).
